plugin.name: Core - consumption events + intoxication decorators
plugin.description: Installs SNPlayerNeeds.esp and the tracker script: reports the player's potion/food/ingredient consumption to SkyrimNet as native Player Reactions events (Player Ate Food / Drank Potion / Ate Ingredient / Consumed), and registers the snpn_drunk / snpn_holds_liquor decorators the Intoxication prompt uses. Needed ONLY for consumption events and the Intoxication prompt — the Survival Needs and Stress and Fear prompts are pure prompts and work without it. On by default; deselect if you only want those standalone bio prompts.

plugin.name: Survival Needs prompt
plugin.description: Adds a first-person SkyrimNet bio section describing the player's hunger (including well-fed), thirst, cold, and exhaustion, read via the built-in has_magic_effect decorator from whichever survival system is installed — CC Survival Mode / SMI / Starfrost or SunHelm; thirst from LoreRim's thirst notifications or SunHelm. Pure prompt — no dependency on Core. Silent if you don't run a survival mod.

plugin.name: Intoxication prompt
plugin.description: Adds a SkyrimNet bio section describing how drunk an actor is (player or NPC), driven by the snpn_drunk decorator from Core. Portable across modlists (Requiem, CACO, Last Seed, SunHelm, Conner's, Alcoholic Lite, Starfrost) and aware of "holds their liquor" perks. REQUIRES Core (leave Core selected).

plugin.name: Stress and Fear prompt
plugin.description: Adds a first-person bio section describing the player's stress level, active creature phobias, and phobias they've overcome, read from the Stress And Fear mod (Nexus 116522) via SkyrimNet's built-in decorators. Pure prompt — no dependency on Core. Auto-selected when Stress and Fear.esp is present; silent otherwise.

plugin.name: Disease prompt
plugin.description: Adds a bio section describing an actor's active disease(s) — Ataxia, Bone Break Fever, Rockjoint, Rattles, Brain Rot, Witbane, Sanguinare Vampiris, food poisoning — with symptoms grounded in each disease's real effect and a severity tag as it worsens. Detected via the built-in has_spell decorator on the disease abilities, so it works for the player AND diseased followers/NPCs. Tuned for LoreRim/Requiem + CC-Survival naming (also detects the vanilla Disease* forms). Pure prompt — no dependency on Core. Silent when no disease is active.
